EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} started a merge of branches on request !{numfield3} for the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created merge request !{numfield3} for the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} approved merge request !{numfield3} for the project with ID {numfield1} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to create merge request !{numfield3} for the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to approve merge request !{numfield3} for the project with ID {numfield1} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to revoke approval of merge request !{numfield3} for the project with ID {numfield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} revoked approval of merge request !{numfield3} for the project with ID {numfield1} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to start a merge of branches on request !{numfield3} for the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
